#  Create Inspections on a Drawing (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/inspections-project/permissions)
  * **Additional Information:**
    * This action can also be performed while an active network connection is not available on your mobile device (offline mode). Tasks performed in offline mode will be synced with Procore after a network connection has been reestablished.
    * You can also link existing inspections to the drawing. See [Link Items to a Drawing (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/link-items-to-a-drawing-ios)


##  Prerequisites 
  * The drawing must exist on the project.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **Drawings** tool using the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap the drawing you want to add an inspection to.
  3. In the markup toolbar, tap the shape or line you want to add to the drawing. See [Mark up a Drawing (iOS).](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/mark-up-a-drawing-ios)_  
_**Note:** This markup will be associated with the new inspection.
  4. After you have placed the markup, tap **Link**.
  5. Tap **Link an Inspection**.
  6. Tap![Icon Plus Quick Create Mobile2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a27be202634839c76584fe365cc247fb/1c03472023e1b0974c6f7b58a4235d9d/icon-plus-quick-create-mobile2.png?fm=webp&h=20)to create a new inspection.
  7. Select and enter the appropriate information for the inspection. See [Create an Inspection (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/inspections-ios/tutorials/create-an-inspection-ios).
  8. Tap **Save**.
  9. To publish your changes, tap the markup and tap **Publish**. See [What is the difference between personal and published drawing markups?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-difference-between-personal-and-published-drawing-markups)


## See Also
  * [Which tools currently support the Bookmarks feature on the Procore mobile app?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-tools-currently-support-the-bookmarks-feature-on-the-procore-mobile-app)
  * [Create an Observation from an Inspection (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/inspections-ios/tutorials/create-an-observation-from-an-inspection-ios)
  * [Create an Inspection (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/inspections-ios/tutorials/create-an-inspection-ios)
title: Create Inspections on a Drawing (iOS)
description: How to create inspections on a project drawing using the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.
